mapper.select: select ai.id, ai.project_id, ai.item_name, json_unquote(json_extract(ai.remark, '$.itemType')) as item_type, ai.description, ai.status, ai.checker_id as owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, cast(json_unquote(json_extract(ai.remark, '$.attachmentId')) as signed) as attachment_id, ai.checked_at as accepted_at from acceptance_item ai left join sys_user u on u.id = ai.checker_id where ai.project_id = #{projectId} and ai.is_deleted = 0 order by ai.created_at desc

select ai.id, ai.project_id, ai.item_name, json_unquote(json_extract(ai.remark, '$.itemType')) as item_type, ai.description, ai.status, ai.checker_id as owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, cast(json_unquote(json_extract(ai.remark, '$.attachmentId')) as signed) as attachment_id, ai.checked_at as accepted_at from acceptance_item ai left join sys_user u on u.id = ai.checker_id where ai.project_id = #{projectId} and ai.id = #{id} and ai.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update acceptance_item set item_name = #{itemName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, checker_id = #{checkerId}, checked_at = #{checkedAt}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, receiver_id, project_id, biz_type, biz_id, title, content, read_status, read_at, created_at from notification where receiver_id = #{receiverId} order by created_at desc

select * from ( select p.id, 'PROJECT' as type, p.name as title, p.description as summary, p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name from project_info p where p.is_deleted = 0 and (#{projectId} is null or p.id = #{projectId}) and (#{type} is null or #{type} = '' or #{type} = 'PROJECT') and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) union all select t.id, 'TASK' as type, t.name as title, t.description as summary, t.project_id, p.name as project_name from project_task t inner join project_info p on p.id = t.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where t.is_deleted = 0 and (#{projectId} is null or t.project_id = #{projectId}) and (#{type} is null or #{type} = '' or #{type} = 'TASK') and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or t.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or t.description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) union all select r.id, 'RISK' as type, r.name as title, r.description as summary, r.project_id, p.name as project_name from risk_register r inner join project_info p on p.id = r.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where r.is_deleted = 0 and (#{projectId} is null or r.project_id = #{projectId}) and (#{type} is null or #{type} = '' or #{type} = 'RISK') and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or r.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or r.description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) union all select l.id, 'LESSON' as type, l.title as title, l.content as summary, l.project_id, p.name as project_name from lesson_learned l inner join project_info p on p.id = l.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where l.is_deleted = 0 and (#{projectId} is null or l.project_id = #{projectId}) and (#{type} is null or #{type} = '' or #{type} = 'LESSON') and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or l.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or l.content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ) s order by project_id desc, id desc
